target: 15. Out-of-Control Gears
Shin-chan and I have to go home for a bit anyway, so how about you come with us, Koyuba-san?
Yeah... then I think I'll take you up on that offer.
...Huh? Shinpei-kun...?
Hah... hah...
(I... came back...)
What's wrong? You look really pale--
Urp.
Blerghh...
Sh-Shin-chan!?
Shinpei-kun, are you okay!?
Hah... hah...
Did you swallow seawater when you fell in!? Did you hit your head or something!?
If you still feel sick, should I rub your back?
(Mio... Koyuba-san...)
(They're both alive!)
Sh-Shin-chan...?
Thank... god...
Ah, I'm fine... I probably just got seasick on the ferry.
Really? It's been quite a while since you got off the ferry, though.
Shinpei-kun, do you want some water? I haven't opened this bottle yet.
Shin-chan, you should gratefully accept it.
A-Ah...
(Hah, hah, calm down. First, I need to sort out the situation...)
(The first time was on the ferry. The second time was right after landing. And this time--the third time, is after meeting Mio...)
(The 'starting point' when time loops is gradually getting pushed back...)
(And the events that occurred before the starting point seem to become established 'facts'.)
(In other words, there's no way for me to avoid falling into the sea anymore.)
(The starting point for the next loop will probably be even later than this time...)
Mmm... walking around the island like this really makes me feel like I've come home~!
Koyuba-san, how many years has it been since you last visited?
I moved away when I was in fifth grade, so... About 7 years?
(If I just sit back and do nothing, during Koyuba-san's live show...)
(That tragedy will repeat itself.)
This is amazing. I only intended to increase Mother's meals, but to think I'd get to see such an interesting spectacle.
(Who is 'Mother'...? The boss of the Shadows? What are they planning to do by using so many people like sacrifices?)
(To begin with, what can I even do to stop that tragedy?)
(Should I ask them to cancel the festival and tell everyone to escape the island?)
(But I don't think that's realistic, and if those guys find out, they might just accelerate their plans...)
On your days off, do you go to places like Shibuya?
I go sometimes, but not that often, I guess. If anything, I go to Jimbocho.
(In the end, my ultimate goal is a fundamental solution... Which means defeating the boss of the Shadows.)
(But with the boss's identity currently unknown, there's no way for me to make a move.)
(The only thing I can do right now is try to work things so that as few people as possible gather on this island...)
Koyuba-san, you have a meeting with the Chamber of Commerce after this, right!?
Eh, yeah, I do, but... How did you know that, Shinpei-kun?
(The reason so many people gathered at the festival was because Koyuba-san talked about the live show on her own channel.)
(If I can get her to cancel the stream before the meeting decides how to announce the live show...)
Don't tell me... Did you notice what my job is?
Eh, what do you mean?
Hmm... I guess there's no point in hiding it. It'll probably be found out soon anyway. Umm, you see--
Eeeehhhhh!? Koyuba-san, you're THAT idol, Kaori-chan!?
Y-Yeah. Actually, I am.
Wow, I'm so moved! You're the real Kaori-chan!

I came back to the island
because I'm doing a secret live stream and talk show
on the festival day.
Koyuba-san, about that event, if possible, right now...

No, sorry!
Wait a second!
(Suddenly telling her to cancel it would just confuse Koyuba-san, and...)
(it might even end up hurting her...)

Um… about the meeting after this…
Can't you skip it?
…Why?
I noticed the live because I actually read a rumor online that a big idol was going to do a live on Hitogashima.
Also, there were posts saying that a stalker targeting Koyuba-san had already arrived on the island.
It's dangerous for an idol like Koyuba-san to come to a place like this.
Then... what are you telling me to do?
Right... how about you don't participate in the meeting today, and go back to the mainland by ferry for now?

I can't do that.
It's an important meeting.
B-But... Koyuba-san's safety...!
I know Ajiro-kun is worried about me, but it's still impossible.
Besides... I was the one who asked to come to the island early and have a meeting.
I wanted to talk after feeling the air of my hometown... I had them set up the schedule because I said that, so I can't be the one to cancel it.
Th-Then, after the meeting is over, go back to the mainland for now, and come back on the day of the festival!
That's impossible…
Shin-chan... If you keep asking for the impossible, you're just going to trouble Kaori-chan, you know?
But…!
Ajiro-kun, no matter how many times you ask, it's impossible. As a professional, I can't do that.
This time... I finally came back thinking I could do something for the island I love so much.
Even if it means facing some danger or pushing myself, I want to see this through.
I know that, but…
No, you don't understand at all.
Huh…!?

My feelings…
Don't say you can understand them easily!
K-Koyuba-san...
(That's right... Here, I've only just reunited with Koyuba-san)
(Even if someone like me says I understand Koyuba-san's feelings...)
I wanted Ajiro-kun to support me, though.
Mio-chan. I'm going to go back to the inn after all.
Huh!? B-But...!
Even though you went out of your way to care for me... I'm sorry!
Wait, Koyuba-san! Absolutely do not stream from your room!
I'm really sorry! But the danger is real!

While you're on the island,
don't leave your room!
Kaori-chan... she left...
(Did my voice reach her…?)
What's really going on? Shin-chan, you're acting weird.
I-It's nothing... I'm just seriously worried about her.
(I'll call Koyuba-san later and apologize to her, but...)
(If possible, I'll try asking her again to cancel the stream at that time.)
(If it means stopping that tragedy... I'll do whatever it takes!)

(The funeral hall…
That person should be there.)
Karikiri-san!
Ah, Shinpei-kun. Thanks for everything today.
Thank you as well.
Um... Karikiri-san, you're joining the meeting with the Chamber of Commerce and Koyuba Kaori after this, right?
After this... no, no, please wait a minute.
Shinpei-kun, why do you know about that?
Huh? Ah, well, that's...
Ah, right. I actually met Koyuba-san at the port. She's my classmate from elementary school...
Ah~ I see. So you heard the circumstances from her. Then there's no need to hide it.
Karikiri-san, I have a request.
What is it?
I think things like how to announce the event will be discussed at today's meeting, but...
I want you to make sure Koyuba-san doesn't stream on her channel.
Eh…?
If things stay like this, something terrible is going to happen on this island. So... please!
Well, even if you say that... There are the intentions of the Chamber of Commerce and Koyuba-san's agency to consider.
P-Please, you have to do something...!
No, no, please wait a minute. It puts me in a tough spot when you say it like that.
What kind of terrible thing are you talking about? What on earth is going to happen?
That's... I can't go into details, but there are people trying to use Koyuba-san's stream to do something bad!
Where did that information come from?
That's... from posts online...
Can you show me those posts?
Ah…
Sorry, I just found the posts by randomly searching, so... I can't show them to you right now.
...I see. But with just that, it would be difficult to bring it up as an agenda item at the meeting.
N-No way...!
Anyway, Shinpei-kun, how do you even know about the stream?
That's something we're supposed to discuss for the first time at the meeting after this, yet you knew about it well.
Th-That's...
...Well, please calm down. Aren't you just confused because of what happened with Ushio-chan?
Just take a good rest today, and leave the rest to us.
Y... yes...
Good evening, everyone~~~!
It's Kaori Koyuba's 'Koyuba Channel'! Let's stay up a little late again tonight and chat together!
Damn, the stream has started…
(I tried negotiating with the Chamber of Commerce after that, but it didn't work out in the end.)
(I tried contacting Koyuba-san several times by phone and email, but...)
I'm currently at a certain place~. Where could it be?
(She didn't respond at all. Maybe she's completely lost patience with me...)
Huh? You want me to give the answer quickly? Jeez, someone's impatient.
Then I guess I'll reveal the correct answer. The answer is...
It's Hitogashima Island in Wakayama Prefecture!
…Huh?
Announcement time~! Believe it or not, I, Kaori Koyuba...!
On July 24th, I'll be holding a solo live & talk show right here on Hitogashima!
Wh... she revealed the location!?
Wh-What the hell is going on!?
Based on my past experience, the live venue wasn't supposed to be revealed until the very end...!
Actually, this live stream was supposed to be a secret live, but...
Due to my strong request, we changed it so that it's properly announced in advance!
(Why did it change...? Is it because I made Koyuba-san angry?)
Because of that, sorry the venue announcement is so last minute~.
The live is scheduled for the day after tomorrow, so the number of people who can attend in person might be limited...
Huh? "I'm going to be there!" you say? I'm so happy~!
Hitogashima is my hometown... It's a place I love very much!
So... if you'd like, I'd be happy if you all came to visit.
(That's an insane number of comments... At this rate, even more people than last time might flood the island.)
(This is bad... I have to do something!)
"Don't go to Hitogashima, there will be a panic!"
(Everyone, please! Look at this comment and reconsider!!)
...And so! See you next time at the live & talk show stream!
This has been the 'Koyuba Channel'! Good night!
(Damn it, it got buried by other comments, and no one noticed my comment...)
(In the first place, who would even believe something like this...)
(No, I can't give up! I'll find some way to tell everyone!)
